title: 1) Epidermis
text:
The epidermis is the outer layer of the three layers of skin and is composed of four
different types of cell. Keratinocyte is the most abundant (90%) and produces keratin, which
is an outer barrier for the body. Melanocyte (pigment cell) synthesizes melanin, which gives
color to the skin. Langerhan’s cell works for immunity, and the Merkel cell is involved in
sensation.
